title: Stonecobbling
description: Allows stone & deepslate to be cobbled with a stonecutter
body:
Allows Cobblestone & Cobbled Deepslate to be made from basic Stone/Deepslate via stonecutting. This includes derivative recipes (ex. Cobblestone Stairs).

Note: Tiles/Bricks/Polished deepslate are not included. However, this is available in its own [datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/deepcutting).

![It Works](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6R6Tq5dp/images/f1d59cdd461e665eb0aa4c3aa3fd930658d0f51a.png)

![It still works](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6R6Tq5dp/images/111cb0aa8b0aa8facb16ae2c982f6e32ea71e70e.png)
